Divination is a [[Disruptive Strategies|Disruptive Strategy]]
[[Category:Underseer]]
[[sn:Divination]][[Category:Disruptive Strategies]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Divination]][[sn:Divination]][[Category:Pages that existed before the Great November Outage]]
[[sn:Divination]][[sn:Divination]][[Category:Divination]]
[[sn:Divination]][[sn:Divination]]==Plans==
[[Immanuelle]] is planning on making a [[Tarot video]] for the new year
[[Category:Pages]]
